description: 确保 opencode/codegen 执行 red 时也在 eval-test 留下最终 gate 证据。

tasks.title: [scripts/codegen] red 结果强制写 eval-test 证据
tasks.notes: 已在 run_codegen_for_adapter.py 增加 wrapper eval 兜底逻辑：缺失 eval 时自动创建 red/green 记录，已有 eval 时追加 Wrapper Gate Result。验证：uv run pytest tests/infra/test_codegen_task_runner.py -q -> 6 passed；uv run ruff check scripts/run_codegen_for_adapter.py tests/infra/test_codegen_task_runner.py -> passed；uv run python -m py_compile scripts/run_codegen_for_adapter.py -> passed；uv run pytest tests/ -q -> 87 passed；git diff --check -> passed。PR：https://github.com/dlange666/xiniu-crawler-planning/pull/10。
